name: Stilton Bread Pudding
recipeIngredient: 6 cups stale crusty white bread, cut into 1/2-inch cubes
recipeInstructions:
1. Butter a 2-quart soufflé dish.
2. Place a layer of bread crumbs on the bottom of the dish and cover with some crumbled Stilton.
3. Continue layering until all of the bread crumbs and cheese have been used.
4. In a large pitcher, mix together the remaining ingredients and pour over the bread and cheese.
5. Cover the dish and chill the pudding for eight hours or overnight in the refrigerator.
6. The next day, place the dish in the oven and turn on to 350°F.
7. Bake the pudding, uncovered, for 65 - 75 minutes, until firm and brown. Serve hot.
